input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.1.7.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.1.7.3
            TITLE: the panel(s) must be made of a solid, non brittle material

            CONTENT:
            rule T.1.7.3: The panel(s) must be made of a solid, non brittle material
T.1.7.3 The panel(s) must be made of a solid, non brittle material

final_answer: The panel(s) must be made of a solid, non brittle material
